{{Infobox character
| name = Navigator
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Shadow, The Elder Empire: Sea
| titles = Navigator
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Navigator Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Navigators]] are members of a specialized [[Guild]] essential for any maritime commerce or travel within the [[Aion Sea]]. They operate unique, one-of-a-kind vessels known as [[Vessels]], which are [[Awakened objects]]. These ships are constructed by integrating parts of an [[Elder]] or a [[Kameira]] into the structure, a complex process that allows the ship to function as more than just a transport. A Navigator is considered [[Soulbound]] to their [[Vessel]], granting them an uncanny ability to control the ship as if it were a physical extension of their own body. Because of this mastery, [[Navigator ships]] are highly valued; passage on a vessel not currently restricted by [[Imperial]] debt is considered a precious commodity. While most [[Navigator ships]] are relatively small and require only a skeleton crew alongside the [[Soulbound]] captain, they are capable of navigating the deep [[Aion]]. [[The Guild]] is known for being highly secretive, protecting its methods more intensely than other groups like the [[Champions]]. Their headquarters in the [[Capital]] is a massive structure built from the remains of ancient ships. Notable individuals associated with the [[Guild]] include [[Cheska Bennett]], who has led the [[Navigators]], and [[Calder Marten]]. The fleet is capable of significant displays of force and can be deployed for various contracts, provided they are not legally bound by the [[Empire]].}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Navigators]] are known to possess their own ships and guard their secrets with even greater intensity than the [[Champions]]. During a journey alongside [[Naberius]] and [[Tristania]], one such Navigator accompanied the group. While these individuals typically undertake officially sanctioned missions, a Navigator eventually approached the party while wearing the [[Emperor's crown]] and carrying an [[Awakened sword]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Navigators]] possess ships.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Navigators]] protect their secrets more closely than the [[Champions]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A [[Navigator]] came down with [[Naberius]] and [[Tristania]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Navigators]] go on officially sanctioned missions.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Navigator]] walks toward the group wearing an [[Awakened sword]] and the [[Emperor's crown]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Navigators]] are capable of steering ships and finding destinations.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c5">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Navigators]] carry personal instructions from [[the Emperor]] and possess the [[Imperial Seal]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c9">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Meia]] is a [[Navigator]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] is a [[Navigator]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c10">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Navigators]] can be booked for trips.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Navigator]] questioned a plan as stupid.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|“What stupid plan is this?” the Navigator asked.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
